hooks.command: timeout 30 python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/status_manager.py --action session-init 2>/dev/null; echo '✓ SocialForge v1.3 loaded' && echo '' && if [ -z "$GEMINI_API_KEY" ]; then echo '⚠ IMAGE GENERATION NOT CONFIGURED' && echo '  GEMINI_API_KEY is not set — AI image generation will NOT work.' && echo '  Get a free key: https://aistudio.google.com/apikey' && echo '  Then set: export GEMINI_API_KEY=your-key-here' && echo '  Or connect fal.ai/Replicate via Connectors panel.' && echo '' && echo '  Without an image API, SocialForge can only:' && echo '    - Parse calendars, match assets, adapt copy, render carousels' && echo '    - Composite existing photos (ANCHOR_COMPOSE with Pillow only)' && echo '  It CANNOT generate new images for STYLE_REFERENCED or PURE_CREATIVE modes.' && echo ''; else echo '✓ Image generation: Gemini API configured' && echo ''; fi && echo 'Quick Start:' && echo '  1. /sf:brand-setup   — Configure a brand (do this first, 5-10 min)' && echo '  2. /sf:index-assets  — Index brand photo library (Drive or local)' && echo '  3. /sf:new-month     — Start monthly calendar production' && echo '' && echo 'Already set up? /sf:status | /sf:switch-brand <name>' && echo '' && echo 'Connectors: 10 HTTP (Notion, Canva, Figma, Slack, Gmail, Calendar, fal.ai, Replicate, Asana, Cloudinary)' && echo 'Storage: persistent via plugin data directory'

hooks.prompt: If this Write/Edit is creating social media copy or image prompts for SocialForge, check: (1) No banned phrases from brand compliance-rules.json. (2) No fabricated statistics or unsourced claims. (3) Platform character limits respected. (4) Brand hashtags included where required. Otherwise respond 'SKIP'. $ARGUMENTS

If this subagent is working on SocialForge content: (1) Load active brand-config.json — enforce brand colors, fonts, visual style. (2) Brand assets are sacred — AI generates around them, never replaces them. (3) All generated images must be shown to user for approval. (4) Follow the 4 creative modes: ANCHOR_COMPOSE, ENHANCE_EXTEND, STYLE_REFERENCED, PURE_CREATIVE. (5) Respect compliance-rules.json banned phrases and disclaimers. Otherwise respond 'SKIP'. $ARGUMENTS

If this task involved SocialForge content production, verify: (1) All generated images approved by user. (2) Copy respects platform character limits. (3) Brand compliance checked (no banned phrases). (4) Logo overlay applied where required by brand-config. (5) Correct image dimensions for target platforms. If any check fails, list issues and ask how to proceed. Otherwise respond 'PASS'. $ARGUMENTS
